$comment: Machine-readable policy for the paperclip-checker App gate. Loaded from the TRUSTED base branch only. Each required check is bound to its expected producing app so a same-named check-run/status from any other app cannot satisfy the gate. github-actions is app id 15368 (slug 'github-actions'); both required checks are produced by GitHub Actions jobs (verify from workflow 'PR', gitleaks from workflow 'Secret Scan'). See doc/PAPERCLIP-CHECKER.md.
